headline: Newmont, Freeport Stocks Drop. Diving Gold Prices Will Continue to Smash Miners.
summary: Freeport-McMoRan Royal Gold  and  Newmont  all dropped—by 3.4%, 3.3% and 7.3%, respectively.  Continuous gold futures  were down 6.9% to $4,257.60 an ounce Monday morning.  The price moves came after President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. would “hit and obliterate” Iranian power plants if Tehran didn’t open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours.
